emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 10/23/00
emails.body: Re: EOL Credit Responses 10/23/00 Tana: No change to profiles for Utilicorp. United Inc. or Calpine Power Services Company these entities are authorized to trade US power. Constellation Energy Source, Inc. is NOT authorized restricted by credit. Leslie

emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 10/23/00
emails.body: Re: EOL Credit Responses 10/23/00 Tana: No change to profiles for Utilicorp. United Inc. or Calpine Power Services Company these entities are authorized to trade US power. Constellation Energy Source, Inc. is NOT authorized restricted by credit. Leslie

emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 10/23/00
emails.body: Just confirming...for Utilicorp. we previously had them open for Enron Sales only.... Leslie Hansen 10/23/2000 04:16 PM

emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 10/23/00
emails.body: Just confirming...for Utilicorp. we previously had them open for Enron Sales only.... Leslie Hansen 10/23/2000 04:16 PM

emails.subject: Re: EOL Credit Responses 10/23/00
emails.body: Tana: Thanks for following up Utilicorp. was initially set up for Sales only but subsequently opened up for Sales and Purchases. So, they should be open for US power. Leslie Tana Jones 10/24/2000 01:22 PM
